subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: During the reign of Fath-'Ali-Shah, one Dhu'l-Faqar Khan governed Simnan, and he was a man possessed of exceeding valor and intrepidity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در زمان فتعلیشاه ذوالفقار خان نامی حاکم سمنان بود بسیار شخص غیور و جسوری بود
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @Imam Husayn, @accounts of dreams and visions, @eulogies; reminiscences
